items.title: Progress journal / checkpoint-resume
items.context: Implemented Step 0 (checkpoint detection + resume), Checkpoint Protocol (schema, write mechanism), checkpoint writes at 8+ transition points, artifact persistence for all 7 process types, cleanup after digest. Reviewed by Sarah — PASS_WITH_NOTES, all critical issues fixed.

items.title: Request-clarify loops for engineers
items.context: Added selective pre-build clarification to 4 complex process types (design-then-build, research-then-build, full-pipeline, migration). Simple processes (fix, content) skip it. Reviewed by Sarah — PASS after fixes (forward-reference, artifact_paths schema, full-pipeline responder). KR-12 ACHIEVED.

items.title: Manager re-planning mid-directive — DEFERRED (2026-03-02)
items.trigger: When an audit reveals Morgan's plan is fundamentally wrong (next occurrence where audit contradicts plan)
items.context: Stolen from CrewAI hierarchical process. Morgan currently plans once upfront and the plan is fixed. She should be able to re-plan mid-directive if the audit or build phase reveals the plan is wrong.

items.title: Verbal self-reflection format for lessons
items.context: Both Sarah and Morgan challenged the full Reflexion migration as a category error (research applies to agent loops, not static docs). Implemented lightweight version: (1) fixed duplication in conductor/lessons.md (State Management appeared twice), (2) added Step 6b to SKILL.md with failure-mode format hint, (3) existing flat facts stay as-is. Full Reflexion migration deferred — the real problem is scale/discoverability, not format.

items.title: Episodic memory consolidation
items.context: Both Sarah and Morgan challenged the full personality-file-update approach as creating dual source of truth with conductor/lessons.md. Implemented lightweight: (1) Added conductor/lessons.md to Step 2 read list and all agent prompts, (2) Added consolidation trigger to Step 6b (every 10th directive, consolidate patterns), (3) Fixed lessons.md duplication. Full personality updates deferred — personality files are behavioral contracts, lessons.md is the knowledge store.

items.title: Async parallel initiatives
items.trigger: When sequential execution becomes the bottleneck (directive takes >2 hours with 3+ independent initiatives) — **NOT FIRED** (no reports show >2 hour execution times; all directives complete within normal timeframes)
items.context: Stolen from AutoGen v0.4 event-driven architecture. Run independent initiatives concurrently. Requires dependency tracking between initiatives.

items.title: Tree search for strategy exploration
items.trigger: When Morgan's single-plan approach fails twice (plan fundamentally wrong after audit) — **NOT FIRED** (zero plan failures found across 19 directive reports; reviewers found implementation issues but never fundamental plan errors)
items.context: Stolen from AI Scientist v2. Explore 2-3 strategic approaches in parallel with entropy-guided selection, instead of Morgan committing to one plan upfront.

items.title: Agent personality evolution from experience
items.trigger: After episodic memory consolidation is implemented and running — **FIRED** (episodic memory consolidation done 2026-03-02)
items.context: Added `## Learned Patterns` section to all 4 agent personality files (Morgan, Sarah, Marcus, Priya) with role-relevant patterns extracted from conductor/lessons.md. Added personality evolution trigger to SKILL.md Step 6d — on every 10th directive consolidation cycle, patterns are re-extracted per agent role. Max 8 patterns per agent to prevent bloat. Personality files remain behavioral contracts; learned patterns are curated excerpts, not duplicates.

items.title: Dashboard checkpoint visibility
items.trigger: When checkpoint-resume is used 3+ times and CEO wants dashboard visibility — **NOT FIRED** (no checkpoints directory exists yet; checkpoint-resume hasn't been exercised in production)
items.context: Extend scripts/index-state.ts to scan .context/conductor/checkpoints/ and include active checkpoints in conductor.json for dashboard visibility. Add stale checkpoint detection (>7 days old).

items.title: Auto-move directive from inbox/ to done/ on completion
items.context: Originally manual (moved 5 directives by hand). Now automated: added Step 6f to SKILL.md that runs `mv .context/conductor/inbox/$ARGUMENTS.md .context/conductor/done/` after digest is written. Added to ALWAYS rules. Directive files are automatically archived on completion.

items.title: Foreman skip-marker safety
items.context: Standalone `scripts/foreman.ts` was missing skip marker filtering — would have launched deferred/manual directives via launchd. Server-side foreman had the check but standalone didn't. Also: both foreman implementations missed DEFERRED in backlog `isDone` check. MCP `conductor_launch_directive` had no guardrail for skipped directives. Fixed all three code paths, added lesson to conductor/lessons.md.

items.title: A2A protocol support for cross-framework agent communication
Automatic autonomy adjustment based on acceptance rates
